text.title: Collaborative Group Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the CollaborativeGroup configuration and the workspace-entry shape it produces.

example.code: contributors: - name: ux_lead model: sonnet system_prompt: "You are a UX lead. Output JSON {idea, rationale, risk}." - name: backend_lead model: sonnet system_prompt: "You are a backend lead. Output JSON {idea, rationale, risk}." - name: pm model: sonnet system_prompt: "You are a PM. Output JSON {idea, rationale, risk}." synthesizer: name: editor model: opus max_iterations: 4 token_budget: 30000 workspace_entry_schema: agent: str iteration: int content: object ts: str schema_version: v1

example.note: One contributor (need ≥2), synthesizer == contributor (rule r3), max_iterations beyond ceiling (rule r2), no token_budget, no workspace_entry_schema.

list.item: Synthesizer name differs from every contributor name; ideally different model family.
